errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong

activate.title: Activate your account

intro.subtitle: We're opening a limited pilot to a small group of Dutch contractors. Tell us about your team — if it's a fit, we'll be in touch.

settings.pageSubtitle: Manage appearance now and keep a dedicated place for personal preferences as the portal grows.

settings.accountDescription: Personal account controls will be grouped here instead of spreading them across the sidebar and modal flows.
settings.roadmapDescription: This section reserves a stable place for the settings users will expect next.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the portal language for interface labels, guidance, and future workflow copy.
settings.languageHelper: English and Dutch are stored separately in source so copy can be reviewed and refined later.

toolbar.zoomTooltip: Zoom (click to zoom in, Alt+click to zoom out)

measurement.helpDistance: Click two points to measure distance
measurement.helpAngle: Click three points to measure angle (2nd point is the vertex)
measurement.helpArea: Click points to outline an area; double-click or right-click to finish (min 3 points)
measurement.helpVolume: Click points for base polygon, close to finish, then click to set height
measurement.emptyMessage: Select a mode above to measure distances, angles, or areas
measurement.clearConfirmDescription: This will remove all {count, plural, one {# measurement} other {# measurements}}. This cannot be undone.
measurement.settingsSubtitle: Configure how measurements appear in the viewer

section.statusPlanes: {count, plural, one {# section plane} other {# section planes}}
section.emptyMessage: Add section planes using the buttons above or click surfaces in placement mode
section.placeHint: Click a surface to place a section plane
section.clearConfirmDescription: This will remove all {count, plural, one {# section plane} other {# section planes}}. This cannot be undone.

settings.viewerSubtitle: Customize rendering, controls, and display preferences.
settings.zoomHint: Zoom-in flies through into interiors; max zoom-out caps how far you can pull back.
settings.sprintHint: Hold Shift while moving to go faster
settings.performanceDescription: Skip work while the camera is moving. Restored on idle.
settings.cullingDescription: Skip drawing geometry outside the camera view — the biggest win on large or federated models. Off-screen geometry streams back as you turn toward it.

documentSettings.title: Document settings
documentSettings.controlsLinkedNote: Drag actions derive from 3D settings. Unlink to customise independently.

shortcuts.sectionNavigationSubtitle: Move through views and pan the viewport
shortcuts.sectionModifierSubtitle: Hold-down keys that change pick behaviour

messages.allSelected: All {count, number} elements selected. Select a single element to inspect it.
messages.noElementData: Element data not available. Re-extract the model to inspect this element.
messages.noGlobalId: This element has no GlobalId; attachments cannot be linked.

viewerFindings.count: {count, plural, =0 {No findings} one {# finding} other {# findings}}
viewerFindings.emptyNoItems: No findings linked to this element yet.
viewerFindings.emptyFileEmpty: No findings linked to this file yet.

viewerCertificates.emptyNoItems: No certificates linked to this element yet.
viewerCertificates.emptyFileEmpty: No certificates linked to this file yet.
viewerCertificates.viewerNoPreview: No preview available for this file type.

viewerOrphans.title: Not in this version
viewerOrphans.summary: {count, plural, one {# linked item references an element not in this version.} other {# linked items reference elements not in this version.}}

viewerAttachments.emptyNoSelection: Select an element to view its attachments.
viewerAttachments.emptyMultiSelection: Select a single element to view attachments.
viewerAttachments.emptyNoPage: No attachments pinned on this page.
viewerAttachments.emptyNoFile: No attachments on this PDF yet.
viewerAttachments.pinPlacing: Click on the page to place a pin
viewerAttachments.expandedNotLinked: Not linked — use the link button to connect this file to a 3D element or a PDF region.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.jobAlreadyRunning: Job already started and can't be cancelled
